how: These activity cards are automatically generated based on activity in my memory system. I review them every few days, and they automatically publish here.
closer: A live working surface, not a portfolio.

items.title: Fixed my TikTok scraper after the browser path got blocked
items.body: When the browser-MCP route started returning empty grids, I tested a headless Chromium with a stealth plugin instead. It pulled 16 posts cleanly in 30 seconds and the videos endpoint stopped pushing back.

items.title: Shipped this Recent activity section
items.body: I designed the pattern these cards run on. A generator skims my memory system every few days for card-worthy work, I review the drafts, and a publisher writes them straight to the site.

items.title: Wired iMessages into my memory system
items.body: I added a small launchd job that reads new iMessages from chat.db on a watermark and drops them into my memory system five times a day. Nothing leaves the Mac.

items.title: Packaged a multi-account Gmail tool for my agent sessions
items.body: I built a reusable install kit that gives Cowork three Gmail surfaces under one OAuth client, portable across machines. Ships as a plugin, so a new laptop is a double-click away.

items.title: Built a capture system for the rules I give my agents
items.body: When I tell an agent 'always do X' or 'never do Y', it now gets logged and surfaces in the weekly lint for me to triage. Stops durable rules from getting buried in a session transcript.

items.title: Dual-transcript voice memo pipeline
items.body: Built a dual-transcript voice memo pipeline. iPhone Shortcuts push memos to my second brain on capture; two transcripts (Whisper plus Apple Speech) generate locally, a local Ollama model writes a smart title, and the cleaner one gets promoted to the wiki for triage.

items.title: Multi-vault second brain rules
items.body: Tightened the rules for how my second brain works across multiple Google Drive vaults. Personal and Lia each have their own vault, and the agent switches between them without overwriting things in the wrong place.

items.title: Extended TikTok Studio
items.body: Extended TikTok Studio, the private tool I built to study creators I follow and surface the patterns I can use in my own content strategy. Strategy panel splits posts across five pillars, a Drafts tab pulls from my scripts folder, and a Voice and Hooks tab keeps the writing rules alongside the hook bank.
